concepts.name: Differential Equation
concepts.short_definition: An equation involving an unknown function and its derivatives.

concepts.name: Order of DE
concepts.short_definition: The highest order of derivative present in the differential equation.

concepts.name: Linearity
concepts.short_definition: Whether the differential equation is linear in the unknown function and its derivatives.

concepts.name: Solution to DE
concepts.short_definition: A function that satisfies the differential equation.

concepts.name: General Solution
concepts.short_definition: A solution containing arbitrary constants, representing a family of solutions.

concepts.name: Particular Solution
concepts.short_definition: A specific solution obtained by assigning values to the arbitrary constants.

concepts.name: Initial Conditions
concepts.short_definition: Values of the unknown function and/or its derivatives at a specific point.

concepts.name: Separable DE
concepts.short_definition: A first-order DE that can be written in the form dy/dx = f(x)g(y).

concepts.name: First-Order Linear DE
concepts.short_definition: A first-order DE of the form dy/dx + p(x)y = q(x).

concepts.name: Homogeneous DE
concepts.short_definition: A DE where the constant term is zero (for linear DEs) or can be reduced to a homogeneous form.
